items.blinded_text: A by-election for the Federation A parliamentary constituency of Entity A is expected to be held on relative-date-1 , following the announced resignation of incumbent Entity B. This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the Entity A parliamentary by-election in specified-year. If the election results are not known definitively by relative-date-2 , specified-time ET, this market will resolve to "Other". The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting. In case of ambiguity, this market will resolve solely based on official election results as published by Election A (https://www.wigan.gov.uk/).

question: Will Candidate A win the specified-year Entity A by-election?
